scripts.compile: cross-env IS_BUILD=true BUILD_EXE=true pnpm dotenvx run -f ../../packages/env/.env -- vp pack
scripts.dev: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../../packages/env/.env -- node --import tsx --watch src/index.ts
scripts.reset:e2e-data: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../../packages/env/.env -- node --import tsx scripts/reset-e2e-data.ts
scripts.seed:demo-data: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../../packages/env/.env -- node --import tsx scripts/seed-demo-data.ts
scripts.seed:platform-admin: pnpm dotenvx run -f ../../packages/env/.env -- node --import tsx scripts/seed-platform-admin.ts
